posts.author: apokorny (Alexander Pokorny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Good Day,

I am trying to set up a status dashboard that only shows Yellow (At Risk by default) and Red (Behind Schedule by default) projects. Is this possible? I tried using the filters but there is not filter (that I can find) specifically for the Overview status column.

Thanks!

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Alexander,

Could you share some screenshots of what you are trying to achieve? Are you referring to the Overview widget?

posts.author: apokorny (Alexander Pokorny)
posts.cookedHtml:
Sure:

image1561×401 23.5 KB

Yes this is the overview widget. I cannot see a way to filter it so that only the yellow and red appear.

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hmm. It’s not possible to create filters based on those fields. I’d bet you could find a workaround, however this would not be a normal use case for this widget.

Instead, I’d advise using a board to store data related to projects, with each project represented by an item. Then you could filter by mirrored columns aggregated from connected tasks.
